nasb.text: Now Samson lay until midnight, and at midnight he arose and took hold of the doors of the city gate and the two posts and pulled them up along with the bars; then he put them on his shoulders and carried them up to the top of the mountain which is opposite Hebron.

esv.text: But Samson lay till midnight, and at midnight he arose and took hold of the doors of the gate of the city and the two posts, and pulled them up, bar and all, and put them on his shoulders and carried them to the top of the hill that is in front of Hebron.

cnv.text: 參孫睡到半夜，就在半夜起來，抓緊城門的門扇和兩邊門柱，把它們與門閂一起拔起來，放在自己的肩頭上，扛到希伯崙對面的山頂去。

ccb.text: 可是，参孙睡到半夜就起来，把城门的门扇连门框和门闩一同拆下，扛到希伯仑对面的山顶上。
